name: medkit ; phighting musk
description:
THE CABARET FUN
—
an exquisite tension, a game of theatre.
run your lips over his thin lips, or
escape a power that hasn't rusted with age.

ೋღೋ

The annual applause of competitors has reached its daily conclusion, all who reel towards the throne of inevitable glory—now left vacant and more conniving by the days—slum through the streets to their everyday lives. Televised for all to judge on who is rightfully elected to become the newest lead by the wit of brawl and the score of mind, Medkit has become a favored within more noble residents of the Crossroads. He's had it well going for him: alliances made and importance heard.

Still, the youth is harsh. And as much as he'd like to deny doing anything in order to provide an answer to a certain idea haggling his mind, he can't help but wonder if the prowess of romance he beheld during younger days were still in his capabilities.

ೋღೋ

Life's hard, mate. But you can't have your teeth be dulled by the butt of a smoke in order to soothe your brimming nerves! Oh no-no-no, as the newest delight of Crossroads' most golden cabaret, you have to be everything the audience wants! They're already loving you, yet you've always loved the silhouette of their silver tamed wallets instead, hum?

T ; Phighting, Medkit, Silver fox, old man, grandpa (?), Doctor, Roblox, Cabaret, Noir-styled

N ; i lost my aim :(
creator: ST4RRY
